parent.text: Elon during the Q1 2026 earnings call: "When we've unveiled various Optimus versions, we've found out our competitors literally do a frame-by-frame analysis and copy everything we're doing." Exhibit A. Xiaomi's Cyber One V2, revealed today, next to Tesla's Optimus Gen 2 - which
parent.name: Oli
parent.embed_html:
Elon during the Q1 2026 earnings call:
"When we've unveiled various Optimus versions, we've found out our competitors literally do a frame-by-frame analysis and copy everything we're doing."

Exhibit A.

Xiaomi's Cyber One V2, revealed today, next to Tesla's Optimus Gen 2 - which… pic.twitter.com/Bzp2rlQaPo

— Oli (@CARN0N) April 28, 2026

ai_summary: A user highlights that competitors are copying Tesla's Optimus humanoid robot design frame-by-frame, citing Xiaomi's newly revealed Cyber One V2 as evidence of competitive imitation. Elon's response—teasing that 'Optimus 3 is special'—signals Tesla's confidence in maintaining technological superiority through continuous innovation cycles rather than resting on current designs, reflecting a core competitive strategy in the robotics/AI hardware space.
embed_html:
Optimus 3 is special

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) April 29, 2026
